description: Lock occupational accident insurance to Germany's 1884 statutory accident-insurance code, with legal-system, prevention, and claims-processing edge semantics.

checks.reason: The node is anchored to Germany's accident insurance code adopted on 6 July 1884.
DGUV says accident prevention was an important function of statutory accident insurance institutions from the outset.
The scoped system was created by an adopted statutory accident insurance code.
The 1884 change shifted compensation claims to statutory occupational accident insurance institutions.
The source-backed direct substrate is statutory legal machinery; labor organization may be background politics but is not the direct dependency for the 1884 code.
